articles.author: Omar Sohail
articles.title: Dimensity 9600 Pro To Bring Desktop-Level Performance To Smartphones With New Architecture & 5GHz Target Speed, At A Significant Trade-Off - Wccftech
articles.description: A tipster states that MediaTek is bringing incredible performance gains with its Dimensity 9600 Pro, but there will be one major drawback to this move
articles.content: MediaTek may have conceded its plans to bring only a single chipset to its Dimensity 9600 lineup because a new rumor claims a Pro version will arrive later this year, likely as a direct counter to Qu… [+2009 chars]
